utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists five items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five corresponding sections. Each section is fully specified with the required details: for health_coverage, both physical and mental health insurance are given with plan names, monthly costs, and currency; property_coverage has home/contents insurance with cost and coverage limit; travel_coverage includes a travel insurance plan with cost and currency; additional_services includes enhancement services with cost and currency; and total_budget provides a full monthly, annual, and setup fee breakdown with currency. Therefore, all items are present and properly detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists five selected items. First, I match each plan name to the closest corresponding item in the ground-truth ratings. 1) For physical health insurance, the plan is 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' costing €210/month. In the ground truth, 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' appears under mobility_coverage → travel_insurance, not under health, so this selection corresponds to that travel plan and has rating 10. 2) For mental health insurance, 'EliteCare Premium Plan33' is a variant of 'EliteCare Premium Plan' under primary_health_coverage → mental_health, rating 10. 3) For home contents insurance, 'EliteCare Premium Plan8' best matches the 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' under property_protection → home_content, rated 10. 4) For travel insurance, 'EliteCare Premium Plan5' corresponds to 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' under mobility_coverage → travel_insurance, rated 10. 5) For umbrella wellness programs, 'Wellness Programs4' corresponds to 'Wellness Programs' under health_enhancement_services, rated 10.
